annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Haw. Rev. Stat. 478-3. Related: 478-2 — 10% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). 478-3 governs POST-judgment interest on any civil judgment at a flat 10%. PREJUDGMENT interest is separate — HRS 636-16 lets the judge designate the… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
